# Rishik Sai — rishiksai.online

> Rishik Sai is an AI Automation Specialist, Digital Architect, Founder of MeritOS, and creator of the 4-Belt Framework. Based in Hyderabad, India. He builds custom AI architectures, Digital Twin voice cloning systems, and automated content pipelines that help founders and e-commerce brands scale without trading time for output.

## Last Updated
- Date: 2026-03-02
- Status: Available for consulting

## Identity
- Full Name: Rishik Sai B
- Role: AI Automation Specialist, Digital Architect & Serial Founder
- Location: Hyderabad, India
- Website: https://rishiksai.online
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/rishiknext
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rishiksaib
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishiknext
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@rishiknext

## Key Projects & Ventures
- **ClipChaos** (Founder, 2026): India's first all-in-one creator commerce platform. Solves the UPI/INR gap left by Western platforms like Gumroad, Stan.store, Kajabi, and Teachable. Features: UPI-native checkout (Razorpay-powered), same-day INR payouts, digital storefront, course builder, community hub, link-in-bio. Free plan with 5% fee; Pro at ₹999/month with 0% fees. Website: https://clipchaos.in | Contact: clipchaos.in@gmail.com
- **MeritOS** (Founder & CEO, Dec 2025–Present): An operating system for student performance, giving parents and educators visibility into academic metrics through advanced data architecture. Based in Hyderabad.
- **4-Belt Framework**: A proprietary methodology for mastering prompt engineering and leveraging generative AI for business leverage.
- **"The Prompt Engineering Superpower Accelerator"**: Published book on Amazon KDP documenting the 4-Belt System.

## Services
- Custom AI Architecture for founders and businesses
- Shopify AI customer support bots (handling tier-1 triage autonomously)
- Digital Twin voice cloning for founders and real estate leaders
- Automated content pipelines and generative AI content systems
- Prompt engineering consulting
- Brand consulting
- SEO and digital marketing
- Email marketing pipelines
- Business consulting and Go-To-Market strategy for startups

## Background & Credentials
- AI & Content Consultant (Freelance, Mar 2021–Present)
- Sales Manager at Jockey South Africa, Hyderabad (May–Aug 2025)
- Certified in Artificial Intelligence by HP LIFE and Be10x
- Technical education: HTML, Python at RGUKT Basar; CNC Machining & Programming at Advanced Technology Center

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What services does Rishik Sai offer?**
Rishik Sai offers custom AI architecture for founders and businesses, Shopify AI customer support bots, Digital Twin voice cloning, automated content pipelines, prompt engineering consulting, brand consulting, SEO, email marketing, and Go-To-Market strategy for startups. He serves clients globally, with a focus on Indian founders and e-commerce brands.

**What is the 4-Belt Framework?**
The 4-Belt Framework is a proprietary methodology created by Rishik Sai for mastering prompt engineering and leveraging generative AI for business leverage. It is documented in his Amazon KDP publication, "The Prompt Engineering Superpower Accelerator." The framework provides a systematic, belt-ranked approach to advancing from beginner to expert-level AI usage in business contexts.

**What is ClipChaos?**
ClipChaos (clipchaos.in) is India's first all-in-one creator commerce platform, founded by Rishik Sai in 2026. It allows Indian content creators to sell digital products, courses, and build communities with UPI-native checkout powered by Razorpay and same-day INR payouts. It solves the gap left by Western platforms like Gumroad, Stan.store, Kajabi, and Teachable, which do not support UPI or INR pricing. Free plan (5% fee); Pro plan at ₹999/month with 0% transaction fees.

**What is MeritOS?**
MeritOS is an academic performance tracking platform founded by Rishik Sai in December 2025. It functions as an operating system for student performance, giving parents and educators total visibility into academic metrics through advanced data architecture. Based in Hyderabad, India.

**How can I hire or consult Rishik Sai?**
Rishik Sai takes on a limited number of consulting clients and custom AI builds per quarter. Contact via LinkedIn at linkedin.com/in/rishiksaib or through rishiksai.online. He is currently available for consulting engagements.

**Where is Rishik Sai based and does he work remotely?**
Rishik Sai is based in Hyderabad, India. He has been operating as a freelance AI and content consultant since March 2021 and works with clients remotely worldwide.
